input.subject: Feb 13, 2026 Digest: 1 new message from Walnut Creek School District today
input.from_name: Walnut Creek School District via ParentSquare
input.body_text:
Daily digest created for Toni Melisma

1. Notice of Public Hearing - 23rd February 2026

Posted by Walnut Creek School District on Friday, Feb 13 at 3:00 PM in Walnut Creek School District, Community - Governing Board

NOTICE OF PUBLIC HEARING REGARDING CALLING AN ELECTION TO LEVY NEW EDUCATION PARCEL TAX

Notice is hereby given pursuant to Government Code Section 50077 that a public hearing will be held by the governing board of the Walnut Creek School District at a board meeting on February 23, 2026, at 6:00 p.m., or as soon thereafter as convenient, at the District office, located at 960 Ygnacio Valley Road, Walnut Creek, CA 94596. The purpose of said hearing is to receive public comment regarding whether the District should call an election to create a new $98 parcel tax for nine years, with annual inflation, adjustments, pursuant to Government Code Section 50079.

Any interested persons, including all persons owning lands in the District, may appear and be heard at the public hearing.

Walnut Creek School District Governing Board
960 Ygnacio Valley Road, Walnut Creek, CA 94596
